info.title: Jobbsöket API
info.description: API for tracking your own job applications.

get.description:
OpenApi3 schema for this API. Format can be selected via content negotiation.

- YAML: application/vnd.oai.openapi
- JSON: application/vnd.oai.openapi+json

The user's application tracker rows. Full CRUD on own rows only.

A status change automatically appends a timeline event, so the
history stays complete without extra bookkeeping.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free text over company, title and notes.

get.description: Download the tracker as CSV (filters apply).

All ad URLs on the user's board — lets the ad search mark
already-saved ads without downloading every application row.
Live search of Platsbanken via JobTech, with optional CV matching.

parameters.name: match_cv
parameters.description: Only jobs that match the user's CV (≥40%).

get.description: Region and occupation-field options for the ad-search dropdowns.
Occupation-group options for one selected occupation field.
Municipality options for one selected region.

The authenticated user's own profile.

GET returns contact details. PATCH updates them. DELETE erases the
account and everything it owns (GDPR right to erasure).

get.description: The authenticated user's structured CV (created empty on first GET).

post.description:
Parse an uploaded CV (PDF/DOCX/TXT) into a structured draft.

The file is processed in memory and never stored; nothing is saved
until the user reviews the prefilled form and submits it.
Suggest evidence terms keyed by CV source row.
Suggest categorized skills extracted from experience rows.

get.description: List or save Platsbanken search presets for the current user.

post.description: List or save Platsbanken search presets for the current user.

Exchange a Google authorization code for our JWT pair.

The SPA redirects the user to Google's consent screen and posts the
returned ``code`` here. Requires GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET in the
environment (the button is hidden in the SPA when unset).

Check the credentials and return the REST Token
if the credentials are valid and authenticated.
Calls Django Auth login method to register User ID
in Django session framework

Accept the following POST parameters: username, password
Return the REST Framework Token Object's key.

Calls Django logout method and delete the Token object
assigned to the current User object.

Accepts/Returns nothing.

Calls Django Auth SetPasswordForm save method.

Accepts the following POST parameters: new_password1, new_password2
Returns the success/fail message.

Calls Django Auth PasswordResetForm save method.

Accepts the following POST parameters: email
Returns the success/fail message.

Password reset e-mail link is confirmed, therefore
this resets the user's password.

Accepts the following POST parameters: token, uid,
    new_password1, new_password2
Returns the success/fail message.
Register without issuing JWT — user must verify e-mail first.

Takes a refresh type JSON web token and returns an access type JSON web
token if the refresh token is valid.

Takes a token and indicates if it is valid.  This view provides no
information about a token's fitness for a particular use.

get.description:
Reads and updates UserModel fields
Accepts GET, PUT, PATCH methods.

Default accepted fields: username, first_name, last_name
Default display fields: pk, username, email, first_name, last_name
Read-only fields: pk, email

Returns UserModel fields.

put.description:
Reads and updates UserModel fields
Accepts GET, PUT, PATCH methods.

Default accepted fields: username, first_name, last_name
Default display fields: pk, username, email, first_name, last_name
Read-only fields: pk, email

Returns UserModel fields.

patch.description:
Reads and updates UserModel fields
Accepts GET, PUT, PATCH methods.

Default accepted fields: username, first_name, last_name
Default display fields: pk, username, email, first_name, last_name
Read-only fields: pk, email

Returns UserModel fields.

EmailRegister.description:
Registration by e-mail only — no username field in the API.

Enforce e-mail uniqueness here so an abandoned unverified signup
cannot be silently replaced by a new registration attempt.

FrontendPasswordReset.description:
Send the reset link to the SPA rather than Django's default view.

allauth's reset form takes a custom ``url_generator``; ours points the
e-mailed link at the SPA carrying uid + token as query params, which
the app reads to show the set-new-password form.

JobApplication.description:
One tracker row.

Created either from an imported posting (pass `posting`, company and
title are snapshotted from it) or as free text (pass `company` and
`title` directly).

JobApplicationList.description:
Lean row for list responses — no timeline.

The board renders hundreds of rows; shipping every row's full event
history made the list payload grow with total activity. The detail
endpoint still includes ``events``.

PatchedJobApplication.description:
One tracker row.

Created either from an imported posting (pass `posting`, company and
title are snapshotted from it) or as free text (pass `company` and
`title` directly).

StatusEnum.description:
* `wishlist` - Sparad
* `applied` - Ansökt
* `screening` - Telefonintervju
* `interview` - Intervju
* `forwarded` - Skickad vidare
* `offer` - Erbjudande
* `accepted` - Accepterat
* `rejected` - Avslag
* `no_response` - Inget svar
* `withdrawn` - Återkallad
